title: THE LION CAGE OPEN
subtitle: Carnival Lot · evening
epigraph_upright: Quiet strength, courage, compassion, the gentleness that doesn't need to prove itself.
epigraph_reversed: Strain, the strength that's actually exhaustion, the cage door open and nothing inside it.
scene_description: The carnival's been closed for years. The merry-go-round still spins if you push it. The lion's gone but the cage is still here.
direction_hint: Hold what you can't hold. The hint is that you don't actually have to.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Carnival Lot · evening.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
